Determines bonus to Dexterity related rolls

Rule: Certain types of armor add all or some of your DEX mod to your AC

Any attempt to move nimbly, quickly, or quietly, or to keep from falling on tricky footing
Control a heavily laden cart on a steep descent. Steer a chariot around a tight turn. Disable a trap. Securely tie up a prisoner. Wriggle free of bonds. Craft a small or detailed object
